flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Alamance Community College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (24.1% → 18.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Alamance Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.4k vs 3.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Alamance Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (61.7% → 72.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Alamance Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 3.1k).
